column1: Values include GST. From 1 September 1989, consents below $5,000 are excluded.
Floor areas are for new buildings only and are imputed when they are not included on consents.

Non-building construction is works that require building consents but are not buildings, such as retaining walls and swimming pools. Many civil engineering works, such as roads, require resource consents but not building consents, so are excluded.
Territorial authority areas are as at 2025.
Each dwelling in a housing project or apartment block is counted separately.
For staged consents, values are recorded at each stage but floor areas and unit counts are normally recorded at the largest stage.
Residential alterations includes relocated dwellings, and new domestic outbuildings such as garages and sheds on residential sections.
